DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Rob Buccieri, Esq. (650.235.4431; rbuccieri@vlplawgroup.com) of VLP Law Group LLP for Defendants.
No other appearances.

Discussed/Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SKIDMORE, OWINGS & MERRILL LLP and WSP USA BUILDINGS, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Plaintiff seeks indemnity and contribution from defendants regarding alleged construction defects. Plaintiff pleads that it is party to a pending arbitration regarding the alleged defects and "if Plaintiff is held responsible to any party in the Arbitration for any of the matters alleged in the Arbitration, the Plaintiff is entitled to indemnity from Defendants." (Cmplt. 3:1-7, 21-28.) Given its contingent nature, I hereby stay this suit pending resolution of the arbitration. (CCP 128; OTO LLC v. Kho (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 141; see also CCP 1281.4.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
